reviews.review_description:
This game was given to me for review. FYI
This is a simple yet challenging game that contains a well done mixed reality experience with a detailed zombie sitting in front of you. I would say each play through takes about 5 minutes or so so it is a great way to play something on the quest with little time. If I had any feedback I would say in game table height adjustments would be nice. I had to mess with my floor boundaries settings to make it work while I was sitting down. But I was pleasantly surprised and even made me jump once or twice. I would recommend this game as a fun game to play that won’t require a long time commitment

I bought this program and I’m having troubles with it when it comes on the card 
Table and him sitting behind it but it loads across the room and have no way to get him to sit in front of me. Please help so I can really read it right now. It looks like a good card game but it doesn’t￼load right. Please correct so I can play the graphics is great. The cards are big the table is big but they’re always across the room or to the right side. Thank you T Duke.

I can’t even move him from From across the room, I can probably meet me closer or pushing back and all the time the screen, who is him sitting in the corner nothing else I can see to correct it  ￼ I am 88 years old and enjoying the new technology. I didn’t understand your last message could you make it a little more Simple for me thank you for your peace, tea, Duke
Well, I am writing this. I wish they could make a all solitaire app where Klondike single, and double pyramid, spades, golf, or any other one I enjoy. my Aqua quest two BNN able to get around it’s a new world for me. Hi can fish go to the casino and see different parts of the world keep up the good work more apps. For us 👍👍👍


￼￼￼￼￼￼ Thank you for information everything’s working fine. I can’t wait to learn how to play it.only the Tutorial is over on the wall and I can’t see it. Well it’s there, but I can’t read what it says or see when it shows what’s happening. Thank you for the Info, I was even surprised when I looked under the table you could see him sitting in a chair, tapping his feet. Ha ha. Great work keep it up big D big T.￼

developer_response.body: It's easy you can recenter yourself in the middle of the table, by opening your hand front on your face and then try to make the index finger touch the thumb finger, or by clicking on the (meta button logo) in the right controller.

reviews.review_description: I like the idea behind this game, really original. Played in mixed reality it gives you the feeling of really playing between monsters! Only feedback for developers is to include a deeper tutorial (e.g. trial game) and different level of difficulty (game currently is a little bit hard 😉)

A difficult game with a small learning curve. 
Try to escape by going through all your cards. 
Visuals are great and so is the sound. 

Have not won yet but am having a great time trying to escape.

Worth the price. Definitely worth checking out!!
I lovee the idea it's very fun scary and exciting 😈 worth buying 😊
